# remscontent_category (Resource)

Manages a REMS categories for the resource items.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "remscontent_category" "category_1" {
  description   = "description for category 1"
  title         = "Category 01"
  display_order = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) Category title.

### Optional

- `children` (List of Number) List of categories children.
- `description` (String) Category description.
- `display_order` (Number) Display order for the category.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Category identifier
